Fixed. Here's the full picture:

---

**Root cause:** Clunger (the `clung.us` server, PID 3716243) started at 21:09 on March 26, before `GITHUB_ALLOWED_USERS` was updated in `/mnt/data/.env.shared` at 00:02 on March 27 to add Kubariet. The terminal-server was restarted at 00:03 and picked up the new env, but clunger was never restarted — so it still held the old allowlist in memory.
